name: misc_3326930-hd_1920_1080_24fps
prompt: The video opens with a serene coastal scene, featuring a cluster of large, rounded rocks in various shades of brown and orange, partially submerged in calm, clear water. These rocks are scattered across the foreground, creating a natural barrier between the viewer and the expansive body of water beyond. In the mid-ground, more rocks extend towards the horizon, meeting a range of rugged mountains that display a mix of green and brown hues, indicating vegetation and rocky terrain. The sky above is overcast with soft, diffused light, contributing to the serene and slightly muted atmosphere. A few seagulls are perched on the rocks, adding life to the scene.  As the video progresses, the camera slowly pans forward, bringing the viewer closer to the rocks in the foreground. The initial focus remains on the rocks and the water, but as the camera continues its movement, it reveals more of the surrounding landscape. The seagulls that were initially perched on the rocks become more prominent as the camera moves closer. Eventually, the birds take flight, their wings flapping gracefully as they soar away from the rocky shore, adding a dynamic element to the otherwise static scene.  By the final frame, the camera has moved significantly closer to the rocks, offering a more detailed view of the textured surfaces and the gentle ripples in the water. The mountains remain in the background, their outlines softened by the distance and the overcast sky, while the seagulls are no longer visible, having flown out of the frame.
